page: Microsoft Azure DC96es_v5 is a virtual machine instance belonging to the DCEV5 server family. This instance runs on the x86_64 CPU architecture and is powered by an Intel processor. It features 96 dedicated virtual CPUs managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU core.

This server configuration does not include any local storage or bundled GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external volumes. The instance is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing users to attach high-performance external storage options to meet input/output demands. Additionally, the instance does not provide any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the DC96es_v5 offers a high-density compute and memory footprint suitable for enterprise-scale workloads. Because it lacks local storage and GPU hardware, the cost profile is optimized strictly for CPU and memory resource allocation, avoiding premium surcharges associated with specialized hardware accelerators. This configuration is suited for large-scale general-purpose applications, relational databases, enterprise application servers, and memory-intensive processing tasks that rely on network-attached storage.
description: Microsoft Azure DC96es_v5 is an x86_64 virtual machine instance from the DCEV5 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. Powered by an Intel processor, it delivers 96 dedicated vCPUs and 384.0 GB of system memory, establishing a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance features no local storage, but it is Premium Storage capable, enabling high-performance external disk attachments. There are no integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses included in this configuration. Qualitatively, the server provides a high-density resource profile optimized for workloads requiring substantial CPU and memory capacity without the added cost of specialized hardware accelerators. It is suited for enterprise applications, relational databases, and general-purpose workloads that utilize network-attached storage.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC96es_v5 is a DCEV5-family virtual machine featuring 96 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 384.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, optimized for enterprise workloads without local storage.
